overview: A 3D immersive landing page for Kernal & Key — a startup offering paid internship programs with certificates and placement for college students.
features: Animated 3D hero section with floating particles and rotating geometry
What We Offer section with glassmorphism service cards
How It Works 4-step flow with animated connectors
Sample student testimonials with star ratings
Futuristic light theme with electric blue and purple accents
Smooth scroll animations and parallax effects
